description_long: This is a vertically oriented rectangular mirror set within a robust, dark wooden frame. The frame features squared, slightly protruding corners, giving it a craftsman or mission-style appearance. The mirror surface itself shows visible wear, with several cracks and scratches, suggesting age or heavy use. The back of the object is a solid wood panel, matching the frame in color and texture, with no visible mounting hardware. The sides are narrow, revealing the thickness of the frame and the mirror panel. The overall look is utilitarian yet sturdy, suitable for outdoor or semi-public urban environments.
description: A rectangular, vertically oriented mirror with a thick, dark wooden frame and a visibly cracked reflective surface, exuding a rugged, utilitarian style.
description_view_0: A side profile showing the narrow thickness of the frame and mirror, with a slight protrusion at the corners.
description_view_1: The front view displays the cracked, aged mirror surface set within a dark, squared wooden frame.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile, mirroring the narrow thickness and frame details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a solid, unadorned wooden panel matching the frame, with no visible mounting hardware.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, thick dark wood frame with squared, protruding corners and a utilitarian, craftsman style.
attribute_reflective_quality: slightly distorted with visible cracks and wear
